title: From Purple Phobias to Trump Portraits: The Strangest Hotel Guest Requests
author: Jonathan Bush
excerpt: From banning the color purple to requesting three different photos of a confused Donald Trump, hotel staff have handled some deeply questionable guest requests. But when does a funny ask turn into a logistical nightmare? Some hotel managers have figured out how to keep guests happy without turning their staff into personal assistants for Jeff Goldblum enthusiasts. Hereâ€™s how theyâ€™re doing it.
